productDisplayName: Enroute Men Leather Black Formal Shoes
description: Indulge in the luxury of pure leather with this pair of mid-ankle shoes from enroute. In a classic silhouette and offering great Fit, this oxford makes for a fabulous addition to your wardrobe. This pair comes with a shoe bag and a plastic tongue. Upper Full grain leather upper with supple leather inner lining for breathable comfort Lacing system for a snug, customised fit Padded footbed for all-day comfort Mid-ankle for better lower leg support and for style Midsole EVA midsole for impact protection Outsole TPR outsole in a grainy texture, with lugs on the periphery and flower shaped lugs on the centre of the forefoot Raised and textured heel for ergonomic comfort and style Shoe care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner Do not store in direct sunlight
